curriculumVersion.name: CBSE/NCERT Detailed Starter 2026-27
notes: Classes IX-X Mathematics, Science and Social Science are aligned to official CBSE 2026-27 curriculum and common NCERT chapter structure.

Classes I-VIII and language/literature rows are curated learning strands from official NCERT/NCF materials; exact textbook titles and chapter names must be reviewed against the books used by the school.
Topics are concise trackable learning units, not verbatim reproductions of textbook content.
Marathi is not included as a universal CBSE subject because language combinations vary by school and region; add it as an optional school-specific curriculum.
